description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen on the front. The back is matte black with a subtle Apple logo centered and a prominent triple-lens camera array in the top left corner, each lens encircled by a metallic ring. The sides are flat and appear to be made of metal, with visible buttons along the left edge. The front display shows a colorful wallpaper and a grid of app icons, typical of iOS devices, along with a notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The device is thin and compact, with a premium finish and minimalistic design. No external case or cover is present, and the overall appearance is consistent with recent Apple iPhone models.
description: A sleek, black smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, triple rear cameras, and a minimalist Apple design. The front display shows app icons and a colorful wallpaper.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a matte black finish, centered Apple logo, and a triple-lens camera array in the top left corner.
description_view_1: Left edge view displaying the device's slim profile and the placement of side buttons.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the large glass touchscreen, colorful app icons, and a top notch for sensors and the front camera.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing the thinness of the device with no visible buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: A dark, subtle Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, blending with the matte black finish.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful wallpaper with a grid of app icons, including Calendar, Photos, Camera, Maps, Clock, and others, along with a time display and a notch at the top for sensors.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array located in the top left corner on the back, arranged in a triangular pattern with each lens encircled by a metallic ring.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the left edge, likely including a volume rocker and mute switch; no buttons are visible on the right edge or below the screen.
